news.t: How Traders Are Using Sector Rotation to Plan Trades

holdings.infoBox: XLSR is an equity ETF with a total of 27 individual holdings.

overview.description: The State Street US Sector Rotation ETF (XLSR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively-managed portfolio of companies classified within favorable sectors of the S&P 500. XLSR was launched on Apr 2, 2019 and is issued by State Street.

data.title: How Traders Are Using Sector Rotation to Plan Trades
data.text: Traders may benefit from sector rotation, focusing their current efforts in the technology and consumer discretionary sectors.
